items.name: CertifEye
items.description: CertifEye is a read-only, privacy-preserving assessment package for Microsoft Active Directory Certificate Services. It collects evidence for ESC1–ESC11 posture and historical certificate issuance, then produces an evidence-backed PDF, HTML report, findings CSV, and deterministic graph exports.
